goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'broxbourne' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 12:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the north
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free wifi
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from broxbourne and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 12:45 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
